---
name: handoff
description: Write a concise handoff summary of the current troubleshooting or debugging activity so the next agent or a future session can continue without re-deriving anything. Use when winding down a long investigation or when asked to summarize where we are.
keywords: [handoff, summary, session, debugging]
---

# Write a handoff summary

Capture the current state of an investigation — what is known, what was tried, what
is still open — so the next agent or session continues without re-deriving context.
